_comment: Maps the mouse side button (BTN_SIDE) to trigger a region capture.
1. Install input-remapper: sudo dnf install input-remapper  (Fedora)
2. Enable the service:     sudo systemctl enable --now input-remapper
3. Open input-remapper-gtk, click 'Import', select this file.
4. Choose your mouse device, then click 'Apply' and 'Autoload'.
The mapping executes `clipshot --region` via a terminal command.
Adjust BTN_SIDE to BTN_EXTRA (thumb-2) or another button as needed.
name: clipshot
